pi_items.source: Export logic in export_result.sh checks this exact file path.
Export logic in export_result.sh queries moz_places for '%check.torproject.org%'.
Export logic in export_result.sh queries moz_places for '%www.torproject.org%'.
Export logic in export_result.sh checks for 'Tor Connection Verifier' in bookmark title.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires interacting with live websites check.torproject.org and www.torproject.org, making the data non-synthetic. The export script verifies these exact domains in the browser history, requires a bookmark titled 'Tor Connection Verifier', and checks for a report at /home/ga/Documents/circuit_report.txt.
